$meta.step: Step 2 — Design System and UX Foundation
$meta.description: Component-scoped aliases. This is the only token layer a component specification is permitted to name directly. A colour alias must reference a semantic colour token and never a primitive colour or a literal hex value. A dimensional, motion, elevation or typographic alias references the corresponding primitive directly, because those layers carry no separate semantic tier.

component.button.primary.backgroundHover.description: Hover and pressed fill of the primary button.

component.button.secondary.border.description: Resting boundary of the secondary button.

component.button.destructive.background.description: Fill of a destructive button. Never the default focus target in a confirmation dialog.

component.button.disabled.label.description: Label of a disabled button, always accompanied by a reason the control is unavailable.

component.button.minHeight.description: Minimum button height on touch surfaces, satisfying size.touch.min.

component.field.border.rest.description: Resting border of a text field.

component.field.border.focus.description: Focused border of a text field, drawn with border.width.focus and border.focus.offset.

component.field.border.error.description: Error border of a text field, always accompanied by an error message that explains recovery.

component.field.label.description: Field label colour. A field is never labelled by placeholder text alone.

component.field.money.fontFeature.description: Money fields render integer Rupiah with tabular figures.

component.statusBadge.success.background.description: Background of a success status badge.

component.statusBadge.success.label.description: Label of a success status badge, always with icon.semantic.success and Bahasa Indonesia text.

component.statusBadge.warning.background.description: Background of a warning status badge.

component.statusBadge.danger.background.description: Background of a danger status badge.

component.statusBadge.syncing.label.description: Label of the SYNCING badge — the server has not yet acknowledged.

component.statusBadge.conflict.label.description: Label of the CONFLICT badge — Bahasa Indonesia: Perlu Diperiksa.

component.dialog.scrim.description: Scrim opacity behind a modal dialog.

component.table.numeric.fontFeature.description: Numeric table columns render with tabular figures.

component.tenantContext.background.description: Background of the persistent tenant and outlet context bar.

component.tenantContext.label.description: Label of the tenant and outlet context bar.

component.offlineBanner.background.description: Background of the persistent offline banner.

component.offlineBanner.label.description: Label of the persistent offline banner.

component.conflictPanel.background.description: Background of the conflict resolution panel.

component.page.background.description: Canonical page background on every surface in the light theme.

component.divider.color.description: Decorative divider between list rows and content groups. Carries no meaning; never the boundary of an interactive control.

component.listRow.selected.background.description: Background fill of a selected list row, always accompanied by a checkmark or an explicit selected label.

component.syncIndicator.background.description: Background of the sync indicator chip while an operation is in flight and the server has not yet acknowledged it.

component.wordmark.accent.description: The single permitted gold in the placeholder text wordmark. The final logo is NOT APPROVED and is never fabricated.

component.link.label.description: Inline link colour inside dense content. Links are never distinguished by colour alone — they carry an underline or an explicit affordance.

component.banner.information.label.description: Label of an informational banner, paired with icon.semantic.information and a Bahasa Indonesia text label.
